film.title: Aag Ke Sholay
film.overview: Aag Ke Sholay (English translation - Flames of Fire) is 1988 Hindi Language Movie directed by S. R. Pratap, starring Hemant Birje, Gulshan Grover, Vijeta Pandit, Sumeet Saigal, Sripada and Rashmi Inder.

dialogues.dialogue: Go on your own way. Now I will always walk on the way of your love, darling. You are very shameless. In only one meeting you have fallen in love. Love always happen in one meeting.
Guest. So you are a guest. I am landlord's nephew. But don't you feel ashamed to enter a girl's room like this? Sorry. Sorry. Sorry.
Now I am relieved. Oh Kallu. - Who's that? Fatikchand you. Rascal, don't you feel ashamed to tease my sister. What? Your sister. - Chamia, are you his sister? Yes, Kallu. - Did you listen?

Keep her down. Down. Very good. She is your sister, and you are taking her. Don't you feel ashamed? Uncle Kans, an uncle like you is been killed by a nephew only. The murderer of my parents, I won't leave you alive today.

Now wear a Ghaghara choli and dance. No one in my family ever shook their legs. In your family no one danced, and....in my family no one forgives. It is a question of our pride. Landlord. - Yes my nightingale. Your pride is our pride. We both know how to dance.

In your family no one danced, and....in my family no one forgives. It is a question of our pride. Landlord. - Yes my nightingale. Your pride is our pride. We both know how to dance. Yes landlord, we won't let your pride down. Why Ganga? - Yes Geeta. Come.
Landlord. - Yes my nightingale. Your pride is our pride. We both know how to dance. Yes landlord, we won't let your pride down. Why Ganga? - Yes Geeta. Come. Let's go.

One is Geeta and the other is Ganga. They both are our enemies. Bring them to us. That's it. It's against Shankar's pride to bring girls, kidnapping them. Tell me some job suitable to my manhood. You'll have to do this work, my fellow.
